/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/hf_tests.dir/cpp/tests/test_feature_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_tests.dir/cpp/tests/test_hawkes_mle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hf_tests.dir/cpp/tests/test_hjb_solver.cpp.o -o hf_tests  libhf_lib.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a _deps/nanobench-build/libnanobench.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
